lines.speaker: G.L.O. Caranock
lines.text: Get out of my office! We WILL have our revenge, human!

lines.speaker: G.L.O. Caranock
lines.text: Just hand over the order human.

lines.speaker: G.L.O. Caranock
lines.text: You must have had to travel a long way to get this to me. Here's a little something extra as a tip.
